eas_text: A civil authority has issued A LAW ENFORCEMENT WARNING for the following counties or areas: Hillsborough, NH; at 6:23 PM on JUN 24, 2019 Effective until 6:53 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: Bedford PD is advising that situation in area of Glen and Oak is resolved, and shelter in place is lifted. Thank you for your cooperation. Bedford PD is advising that situation in area of Glen and Oak is resolved, and shelter in place is lifted. Thank you for your cooperation.
